display.name: PlanetScale PostgreSQL
display.description: Track PlanetScale Postgres connections, session states, PgBouncer pools, commits, locks, WAL archiving, storage, and pod resources. Use branch and role filters.

display.name: branch
display.description: Filter panels by PlanetScale database branch (planetscale_database_branch_id).

display.name: role
display.description: Filter panels by instance role, such as primary or replica (planetscale_role).

display.name: Connections by Role
display.description: Open connections by instance role.

display.name: Connections by State
display.description: Backend connection count by session state.

display.name: Connection Utilization % by Pod
display.description: Per-pod connection utilization from connection_state / settings_max_connections * 100. Use it to find a saturated pod hidden by fleet totals.

display.name: Open Connections vs max_connections
display.description: Total open connections compared with configured max_connections.

display.name: CPU Utilization by Pod
display.description: CPU utilization by pod.

display.name: Disk IOPS by Pod
display.description: I/O operations per second by pod.

display.name: Locks by Mode
display.description: Active locks by mode. Check ExclusiveLock and AccessExclusiveLock growth during contention.

display.name: Memory Utilization by Pod
display.description: Memory utilization by pod.

display.name: Memory RSS by Pod
display.description: Resident memory by pod, in bytes.

display.name: PgBouncer Client Connections
display.description: Client connections into PgBouncer.

display.name: PgBouncer CPU per Peer
display.description: CPU utilization for PgBouncer peer processes.

display.name: Max Client Wait
display.description: Longest client wait for a PgBouncer connection.

display.name: PgBouncer Peers vs Max Client Conn
display.description: Peered PgBouncer processes compared with max_client_conn.

display.name: Client Pool by State
display.description: PgBouncer client connections by pool state.

display.name: Server Pool by State
display.description: PgBouncer server connections by pool state.

display.name: PgBouncer → Postgres Connections
display.description: PgBouncer connections into Postgres.

display.name: Connection Utilization % over time
display.description: Open connection utilization from sum(connection_state) / max_connections * 100.

display.name: Volume Available vs Capacity
display.description: Available and provisioned volume bytes.

display.name: Volume Used %
display.description: Used storage percentage from (capacity - available) / capacity * 100.

display.name: Last Successful Archive Age
display.description: Age of the latest successful WAL archive. A rising line means archiving has stalled.

display.name: WAL Archiver Outcomes
display.description: Successful and failed WAL archive operations.

display.name: WAL Archiver Lag
display.description: WAL bytes waiting for archive, measured as current LSN minus last archived LSN.

display.name: WAL Pending Archive Size
display.description: WAL bytes waiting for archive compared with max_wal_size.

display.name: Commit Rate by Database
display.description: Committed transactions per second by database.

display.name: Pods by Status Phase
display.description: Pod count by Kubernetes status phase. Check non-zero Pending or Failed pods.

display.name: Commit Throughput
display.description: Committed transactions per second from planetscale_postgres_database_xact_commit_total.

display.name: Connection Utilization
display.description: Open connections divided by max_connections.

display.name: CPU Utilization
display.description: Peak pod CPU utilization from planetscale_pods_cpu_util_percentages.

display.name: Open Connections
display.description: Current backend connections across all session states, summed from planetscale_postgres_connection_state.

display.name: WAL Archive Lag
display.description: WAL bytes waiting for archive, measured as current LSN minus last archived LSN. Rising values mean archiving has fallen behind.

display.name: Storage Used
display.description: Used volume percentage, calculated as (capacity - available) / capacity.
